name: Super Quick Sticky Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Soft bread sticks (11 oz), refrigerated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a small bowl, mix melted margarine, brown sugar, and corn syrup. Spread in the bottom of an 8 or 9 inch round cake pan.
3. Remove bread sticks from can and separate into 8 coils. Do not unroll.
4. In a small dish, combine sugar and cinnamon. Dip each bread stick into the mixture, coating the sugared side down in the cake pan.
5. Sprinkle remaining cinnamon-sugar mixture over the bread rolls.
6. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 19 minutes or until golden brown. Allow cooling for 1 minute before serving.
Makes 8 rolls, each with approximately 70 calories, 4 grams protein, 25 grams carbs, 6 grams fat, and 310 milligrams sodium. Approximately 1.7% of the calories come from fat.
